appliedUpdates.description: Added simplify-install CLI isolation guidance plus host-specific ONNX Runtime notes, including the temporary ORT_DYLIB_PATH workaround used to complete local-mode validation.
Recorded that the default linker cache exposes an incompatible ONNX Runtime 1.12 library on this host and that a compatible 1.24.4 runtime under /tmp works when exported via ORT_DYLIB_PATH.

notes: No long-running services or seeded data were required because simplify-install validation used the release CLI surface only.
The build/static validator ran first to produce the shared release binary; API-mode and local-mode flows were then exercised in isolated temp directories.
An initial local-mode run confirmed the graceful missing-ONNX-Runtime error path and revealed that the host linker cache only exposed an incompatible oneAPI ONNX Runtime 1.12 library.

After provisioning ONNX Runtime 1.24.4 under /tmp and exporting ORT_DYLIB_PATH, the blocked local-mode assertions were rerun successfully, including lazy download and cross-project cache reuse checks.
